sampleQuestions.stem: A Boolean function f is to be realized only by NOR gates. Its K-map is given below: AB CD 00 01 11 10 00 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 01 | 0 | 0 | 1 | 0 | 11 | 0 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 10 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 0 | The realization is A. f = (A NOR C

What is the minimum number of NAND gates required to implement a 2-input EXCLUSIVE-OR function without using any other logic gate? A. 3 B. 4 C. 5 D. 6
Find the minimum product of sums of the following expression: f = ABC + A'B'C'

Given f(w, x, y, z) = sum_m(0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11) + sum_d(13, 15); where d represents the 'don't-care' condition in Karnaugh maps. Which of the following is a minimum product-of-sums (POS) form of f? A. (x'+z)(

Find the minimum sum of products form of the logic function F(A, B, C, D) = sum_m(0, 2, 8, 10) + sum_d(5, 11, 12) where m and d represent minterm and don't-care term respectively.

Let f = (θ + y)(y + z) + (θ + z + 1), where θ = x'. A. Express f as the minimal sum of products. Write only the answer. B. If the output line is stuck at 0, for how many input combinations will the value of f be correct?

Let f(x, y, z) = x'y'z' + x'yz' + xy'z' + xyz' be a switching function. Which one of the following is valid? A. yz' is a prime implicant of f B. xy is a minterm of f C. xz' is an implicant of f D. y is a prime implicant
